name: PepMLM
description: Generates peptide binders for any target protein using only sequence data (no structure needed). Uses ESM-2 language model with a custom masking strategy to predict the binder region. Produces candidates validated by AlphaFold-Multimer and experimental degradation assays.
capabilities: Generates peptide binders for any target protein using only sequence data (no structure needed)
Uses ESM-2 language model with a custom masking strategy to predict the binder region
Produces candidates validated by AlphaFold-Multimer and experimental degradation assays

sequence.description: Target protein amino acid sequence (no structure needed)

peptideLength.description: Length of the peptide binder to generate

numSequences.description: Number of peptide binder candidates to generate
